title: Durable Due Scheduling, Clock Injection, Timers, Backoff, and Pause · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in durable handle-clean adaptive scheduler and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debu…
objectives: Persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher guidance, pause cause, and schedule reason outside process timers.
Inject clock and sleep ports, distinguish elapsed from civil time, define boundary equality, and test skew and jumps.
Schedule the next bounded timer only after ownership and settlement, unref deliberately, clear on close, and expose handle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 1335 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. content.text: A debug TypeScript team handles case 4243 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove durable due state, injected clocks, non-overlapping timers, backoff, pause, and handle cleanup; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Model manual, policy, repeated-failure, incident, deletion, and maintenance pauses with authorization, evidence, and safe resume.

steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: feed-ts-pause-resume-policy-1z0mit" that uses case 1292 to prove durable due state, injected clocks, non-overlapping timers, backoff, pause, and handle cleanup.
